questions.prompt: Which sigma notation correctly represents the sum 2 + 4 + 6 + 8 + 10?
questions.explanation: The sum consists of 5 even numbers: 2(1), 2(2), 2(3), 2(4), and 2(5). In sigma notation, this is written as ∑(i=1 to 5) 2i, where the index i starts at 1 and goes to 5, and each term is 2i. Option B only gives odd numbers, option C counts from 2 to 10 (giving incorrect terms), and option D would include 10 terms instead of 5.
